23 #include <arcane/core/VariableTypes.h>
24 #include <arcane/core/IMesh.h>

40 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::Csr
41 {
42 
43 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
44 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
45 
46 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Int32
47 findIndex(Int32 begin, Int32 end, Int32 column_lid, Span<const Int32> in_csr_columns)
48 {
49  for (auto i = begin; i < end; ++i)
50  if (in_csr_columns[i] == column_lid)
51  return i;
52  return -1;
53 }
54 
55 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
56 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
57 
58 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::Csr
59 
60 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
61 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
62 
63 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation
64 {
65 
66 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
73 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
74 
75 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real
76 computeAreaTria3(CellLocalId cell_lid, const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
77  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
78 {
79  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
80  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
81  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
82 
83  auto v = math::cross(n1 - n0, n2 - n0);
84  return v.normL2() / 2.0;
85 };
86 
87 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
88 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
89 
90 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real
91 computeAreaTria(FaceLocalId face_lid,
92  const IndexedFaceNodeConnectivityView& fn_cv,
93  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
94 {
95  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 0)];
96  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 1)];
97  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 2)];
98 
99  auto v = math::cross(n1 - n0, n2 - n0);
100  return v.normL2() / 2.0;
101 };
102 
103 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
111 
112 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real
113 computeVolumeTetra4(CellLocalId cell_lid,
114  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
115  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
116 {
117  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
118  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
119  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
120  Real3 n3 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 3)];
121 
122  Real3 v0 = n1 - n0;
123  Real3 v1 = n2 - n0;
124  Real3 v2 = n3 - n0;
125 
126  return math::abs(math::dot(v0, math::cross(v1, v2))) / 6.0;
127 };
128 
129 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
135 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
136 
137 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real
138 computeLengthFace(FaceLocalId face_lid,
139  IndexedFaceNodeConnectivityView fn_cv,
140  Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView in_node_coord)
141 {
142  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 0)];
143  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 1)];
144 
145  return math::sqrt((n1.x - n0.x) * (n1.x - n0.x) + (n1.y - n0.y) * (n1.y - n0.y));
146 }
147 
148 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
155 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
156 
157 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real2
158 computeNormalFace(FaceLocalId face_lid,
159  IndexedFaceNodeConnectivityView fn_cv,
160  Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView in_node_coord,
161  FaceInfoListView faces_infos)
162 {
163  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 0)];
164  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 1)];
165 
166  if (!faces_infos.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside(face_lid)) {
167  Real3 tmp = n0;
168  n0 = n1;
169  n1 = tmp;
170  }
171 
172  Real2 N;
173  Real norm_N = math::sqrt((n1.y - n0.y) * (n1.y - n0.y) + (n1.x - n0.x) * (n1.x - n0.x));
174  N.x = (n1.y - n0.y) / norm_N;
175  N.y = (n0.x - n1.x) / norm_N;
176  return N;
177 }
178 
179 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
186 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
187 
188 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real3
189 computeNormalTriangle(FaceLocalId face_lid,
190  IndexedFaceNodeConnectivityView fn_cv,
191  Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView in_node_coord,
192  FaceInfoListView faces_infos)
193 {
194 
195  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 0)];
196  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 1)];
197  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[fn_cv.nodeId(face_lid, 2)];
198 
199  if (!faces_infos.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside(face_lid))
200  std::swap(n0, n1);
201 
202  Real3 edge1 = { n1.x - n0.x, n1.y - n0.y, n1.z - n0.z };
203  Real3 edge2 = { n2.x - n0.x, n2.y - n0.y, n2.z - n0.z };
204 
205  Real3 normal = {
206  edge1.y * edge2.z - edge1.z * edge2.y,
207  edge1.z * edge2.x - edge1.x * edge2.z,
208  edge1.x * edge2.y - edge1.y * edge2.x
209  };
210 
211  Real norm = math::sqrt(normal.x * normal.x + normal.y * normal.y + normal.z * normal.z);
212  return { normal.x / norm, normal.y / norm, normal.z / norm };
213 }
214 
215 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE static inline Real
216 computeVolumeHexa8(CellLocalId cell_lid,
217  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
218  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
219 {
220  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
221  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
222  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
223  Real3 n3 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 3)];
224  Real3 n4 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 4)];
225  Real3 n5 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 5)];
226  Real3 n6 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 6)];
227  Real3 n7 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 7)];
228 
229  Real v1 = math::matDet((n6 - n1) + (n7 - n0), n6 - n3, n2 - n0);
230  Real v2 = math::matDet(n7 - n0, (n6 - n3) + (n5 - n0), n6 - n4);
231  Real v3 = math::matDet(n6 - n1, n5 - n0, (n6 - n4) + (n2 - n0));
232  return (v1 + v2 + v3) / 12.;
233 }
234 
235 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
236 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
237 
238 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation
239 
240 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
241 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
242 
243 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D
244 {
245 
246 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
258 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
259 
260 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real3
261 computeGradientXTria3(CellLocalId cell_lid,
262  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
263  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
264 {
265  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
266  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
267  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
268 
269  auto A2 = ((n1.x - n0.x) * (n2.y - n0.y) - (n2.x - n0.x) * (n1.y - n0.y));
270 
271  return { (n1.y - n2.y) / A2, (n2.y - n0.y) / A2, (n0.y - n1.y) / A2 };
272 }
273 
274 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
286 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
287 
288 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real3
289 computeGradientYTria3(CellLocalId cell_lid,
290  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
291  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
292 {
293  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
294  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
295  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
296 
297  auto A2 = ((n1.x - n0.x) * (n2.y - n0.y) - (n2.x - n0.x) * (n1.y - n0.y));
298 
299  return { (n2.x - n1.x) / A2, (n0.x - n2.x) / A2, (n1.x - n0.x) / A2 };
300 }
301 
302 struct Quad4GaussPointInfo
303 {
304  RealVector<4> dN_dx; // Derivatives of shape functions in x {∂𝑁₁/∂𝑥 ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑥 ∂𝑁₃/∂𝑥 ∂𝑁₄/∂𝑥}
305  RealVector<4> dN_dy; // Derivatives of shape functions in y {∂𝑁₁/∂𝑦 ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑦 ∂𝑁₃/∂𝑦 ∂𝑁₄/∂𝑦}
306  Real det_j; // Determinant of the Jacobian matrix at the Gauss point.
307 };
308 
309 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE static inline Quad4GaussPointInfo
310 computeGradientsAndJacobianQuad4(CellLocalId cell_lid,
311  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
312  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord,
313  Real xi,
314  Real eta)
315 {
316  // Shape function derivatives ∂𝐍/∂ξ and ∂𝐍/∂η
317  // ∂𝐍/∂ξ = [ ∂C₁/∂ξ ∂𝑁₂/∂ξ ∂𝑁₃/∂ξ ∂𝑁₄/∂ξ ]
318  // ∂𝐍/∂η = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂η ∂𝑁₂/∂η ∂𝑁₃/∂η ∂𝑁₄/∂η ]
319  const Real dN_dxi[4] = { -0.25 * (1 - eta), 0.25 * (1 - eta), 0.25 * (1 + eta), -0.25 * (1 + eta) };
320  const Real dN_deta[4] = { -0.25 * (1 - xi), -0.25 * (1 + xi), 0.25 * (1 + xi), 0.25 * (1 - xi) };
321 
322  // Jacobian calculation 𝑱
323  // 𝑱 = [ 𝒋₀₀ 𝒋₀₁ ] = [ ∂𝑥/∂ξ ∂𝑦/∂ξ ]
324  // [ 𝒋₁₀ 𝒋₁₁ ] [ ∂𝑥/∂η ∂𝑦/∂η ]
325  //
326  // The Jacobian is computed as follows:
327  // 𝒋₀₀ = ∑ (∂𝑁ᵢ/∂ξ * 𝑥ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟒
328  // 𝒋₀₁ = ∑ (∂𝑁ᵢ/∂ξ * 𝑦ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟒
329  // 𝒋₁₀ = ∑ (∂𝑁ᵢ/∂η * 𝑦ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟒
330  // 𝒋₁₁ = ∑ (∂𝑁ᵢ/∂η * 𝑥ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟒
331  Real2x2 J;
332  for (Int8 a = 0; a < 4; ++a)
333  {
334  const auto& coord = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, a)];
335  J[0][0] += dN_dxi[a] * coord.x;
336  J[0][1] += dN_dxi[a] * coord.y;
337  J[1][0] += dN_deta[a] * coord.x;
338  J[1][1] += dN_deta[a] * coord.y;
339  }
340 
341  // Determinant of the Jacobian
342  const Real detJ = J[0][0] * J[1][1] - J[0][1] * J[1][0];
343 
344  if (detJ <= 0.0) {
345  //ARCANE_FATAL("Invalid (non-positive) Jacobian determinant: {0}", detJ);
346  }
347 
348  // Inverse of the Jacobian
349  // 𝑱⁻¹ = [ invJ00 invJ01 ]
350  // [ invJ10 invJ11 ]
351  const Real invJ00 = J[1][1] / detJ;
352  const Real invJ01 = -J[0][1] / detJ;
353  const Real invJ10 = -J[1][0] / detJ;
354  const Real invJ11 = J[0][0] / detJ;
355 
356  // Gradients in physical space (∂𝐍/∂𝑥, ∂𝐍/∂𝑦)
357  // {∂𝐍/∂𝑥} = [J]⁻¹ {∂𝐍/∂ξ}
358  // {∂𝐍/∂𝑦} {∂𝐍/∂η}
359  RealVector<4> dN_dx_result, dN_dy_result;
360  for (Int8 a = 0; a < 4; ++a) {
361  dN_dx_result(a) = invJ00 * dN_dxi[a] + invJ01 * dN_deta[a];
362  dN_dy_result(a) = invJ10 * dN_dxi[a] + invJ11 * dN_deta[a];
363  }
364 
365  return { dN_dx_result, dN_dy_result, detJ };
366 }
367 
368 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
369 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
370 
371 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D
372 
373 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
374 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
375 
376 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D
377 {
378 
379 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
380 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
381 
382 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
401 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
402 
403 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real4
404 computeGradientXTetra4(CellLocalId cell_lid,
405  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
406  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
407 {
408  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
409  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
410  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
411  Real3 n3 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 3)];
412 
413  Real3 v0 = n1 - n0;
414  Real3 v1 = n2 - n0;
415  Real3 v2 = n3 - n0;
416 
417  // 6 x Volume of tetrahedron
418  Real V6 = std::abs(Arcane::math::dot(v0, Arcane::math::cross(v1, v2)));
419 
420  Real4 dx{};
421 
422  dx[0] = (n1.y * (n3.z - n2.z) + n2.y * (n1.z - n3.z) + n3.y * (n2.z - n1.z)) / V6;
423  dx[1] = (n0.y * (n2.z - n3.z) + n2.y * (n3.z - n0.z) + n3.y * (n0.z - n2.z)) / V6;
424  dx[2] = (n0.y * (n3.z - n1.z) + n1.y * (n0.z - n3.z) + n3.y * (n1.z - n0.z)) / V6;
425  dx[3] = (n0.y * (n1.z - n2.z) + n1.y * (n2.z - n0.z) + n2.y * (n0.z - n1.z)) / V6;
426 
427  return dx;
428 };
429 
430 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
449 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
450 
451 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real4
452 computeGradientYTetra4(CellLocalId cell_lid,
453  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
454  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
455 {
456  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
457  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
458  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
459  Real3 n3 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 3)];
460 
461  Real3 v0 = n1 - n0;
462  Real3 v1 = n2 - n0;
463  Real3 v2 = n3 - n0;
464 
465  // 6 x Volume of tetrahedron
466  Real V6 = std::abs(Arcane::math::dot(v0, Arcane::math::cross(v1, v2)));
467 
468  Real4 dy{};
469 
470  dy[0] = (n1.z * (n3.x - n2.x) + n2.z * (n1.x - n3.x) + n3.z * (n2.x - n1.x)) / V6;
471  dy[1] = (n0.z * (n2.x - n3.x) + n2.z * (n3.x - n0.x) + n3.z * (n0.x - n2.x)) / V6;
472  dy[2] = (n0.z * (n3.x - n1.x) + n1.z * (n0.x - n3.x) + n3.z * (n1.x - n0.x)) / V6;
473  dy[3] = (n0.z * (n1.x - n2.x) + n1.z * (n2.x - n0.x) + n2.z * (n0.x - n1.x)) / V6;
474 
475  return dy;
476 }
477 
478 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
497 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
498 
499 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Real4
500 computeGradientZTetra4(CellLocalId cell_lid,
501  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
502  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
503 {
504  Real3 n0 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 0)];
505  Real3 n1 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 1)];
506  Real3 n2 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 2)];
507  Real3 n3 = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, 3)];
508 
509  auto v0 = n1 - n0;
510  auto v1 = n2 - n0;
511  auto v2 = n3 - n0;
512 
513  // 6 x Volume of tetrahedron
514  Real V6 = std::abs(Arcane::math::dot(v0, Arcane::math::cross(v1, v2)));
515 
516  Real4 dz{};
517 
518  dz[0] = (n1.x * (n3.y - n2.y) + n2.x * (n1.y - n3.y) + n3.x * (n2.y - n1.y)) / V6;
519  dz[1] = (n0.x * (n2.y - n3.y) + n2.x * (n3.y - n0.y) + n3.x * (n0.y - n2.y)) / V6;
520  dz[2] = (n0.x * (n3.y - n1.y) + n1.x * (n0.y - n3.y) + n3.x * (n1.y - n0.y)) / V6;
521  dz[3] = (n0.x * (n1.y - n2.y) + n1.x * (n2.y - n0.y) + n2.x * (n0.y - n1.y)) / V6;
522 
523  return dz;
524 };
525 
526 struct Hexa8GaussPointInfo
527 {
528  RealVector<8> dN_dx; // Derivatives of shape functions in x {∂𝑁₁/∂𝑥 ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑥 ... ∂𝑁₈/∂𝑥}
529  RealVector<8> dN_dy; // Derivatives of shape functions in y {∂𝑁₁/∂𝑦 ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑦 ... ∂𝑁₈/∂𝑦}
530  RealVector<8> dN_dz; // Derivatives of shape functions in z {∂𝑁₁/∂𝑧 ∂𝑁₂/∂𝑧 ... ∂𝑁₈/∂𝑧}
531  Real det_j; // Determinant of the Jacobian matrix at the Gauss point.
532 };
533 
534 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE inline Hexa8GaussPointInfo
535 computeGradientsAndJacobianHexa8(CellLocalId cell_lid,
536  const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv,
537  const Accelerator::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord,
538  Real xi, Real eta, Real zeta)
539 {
540  // Shape function derivatives ∂𝐍/∂ξ, ∂𝐍/∂η, ∂𝐍/∂ζ
541  // ∂𝐍/∂ξ = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂ξ ∂𝑁₂/∂ξ ∂𝑁₃/∂ξ ∂𝑁₄/∂ξ ∂𝑁₅/∂ξ ∂𝑁₆/∂ξ ∂𝑁₇/∂ξ ∂𝑁₈/∂ξ ]
542  // ∂𝐍/∂η = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂η ∂𝑁₂/∂η ∂𝑁₃/∂η ∂𝑁₄/∂η ∂𝑁₅/∂η ∂𝑁₆/∂η ∂𝑁₇/∂η ∂𝑁₈/∂η ]
543  // ∂𝐍/∂ζ = [ ∂𝑁₁/∂ζ ∂𝑁₂/∂ζ ∂𝑁₃/∂ζ ∂𝑁₄/∂ζ ∂𝑁₅/∂ζ ∂𝑁₆/∂ζ ∂𝑁₇/∂ζ ∂𝑁₈/∂ζ ]
544  Real dN_dxi[8], dN_deta[8], dN_dzeta[8];
545  const Real one_minus_eta = 1.0 - eta;
546  const Real one_plus_eta = 1.0 + eta;
547  const Real one_minus_xi = 1.0 - xi;
548  const Real one_plus_xi = 1.0 + xi;
549  const Real one_minus_zeta = 1.0 - zeta;
550  const Real one_plus_zeta = 1.0 + zeta;
551 
552  dN_dxi[0] = -0.125 * one_minus_eta * one_minus_zeta;
553  dN_dxi[1] = 0.125 * one_minus_eta * one_minus_zeta;
554  dN_dxi[2] = 0.125 * one_plus_eta * one_minus_zeta;
555  dN_dxi[3] = -0.125 * one_plus_eta * one_minus_zeta;
556  dN_dxi[4] = -0.125 * one_minus_eta * one_plus_zeta;
557  dN_dxi[5] = 0.125 * one_minus_eta * one_plus_zeta;
558  dN_dxi[6] = 0.125 * one_plus_eta * one_plus_zeta;
559  dN_dxi[7] = -0.125 * one_plus_eta * one_plus_zeta;
560 
561  dN_deta[0] = -0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_minus_zeta;
562  dN_deta[1] = -0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_minus_zeta;
563  dN_deta[2] = 0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_minus_zeta;
564  dN_deta[3] = 0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_minus_zeta;
565  dN_deta[4] = -0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_plus_zeta;
566  dN_deta[5] = -0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_plus_zeta;
567  dN_deta[6] = 0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_plus_zeta;
568  dN_deta[7] = 0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_plus_zeta;
569 
570  dN_dzeta[0] = -0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_minus_eta;
571  dN_dzeta[1] = -0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_minus_eta;
572  dN_dzeta[2] = -0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_plus_eta;
573  dN_dzeta[3] = -0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_plus_eta;
574  dN_dzeta[4] = 0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_minus_eta;
575  dN_dzeta[5] = 0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_minus_eta;
576  dN_dzeta[6] = 0.125 * one_plus_xi * one_plus_eta;
577  dN_dzeta[7] = 0.125 * one_minus_xi * one_plus_eta;
578 
579  // Jacobian matrix (default-initialized to zero see Real3x3.h)
580  // 𝑱 = [ 𝒋₀₀ 𝒋₀₁ 𝒋₀₂ ]
581  // [ 𝒋₁₀ 𝒋₁₁ 𝒋₁₂ ]
582  // [ 𝒋₂₀ 𝒋₂₁ 𝒋₂₂ ]
583  //
584  // The Jacobian is computed as follows:
585  // 𝒋₀₀ = ∑ (∂𝑥/∂ξ * 𝑥ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
586  // 𝒋₀₁ = ∑ (∂𝑥/∂ξ * 𝑦ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
587  // 𝒋₀₂ = ∑ (∂𝑥/∂ξ * 𝑧ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
588  // 𝒋₁₀ = ∑ (∂𝑦/∂η * 𝑥ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
589  // 𝒋₁₁ = ∑ (∂𝑦/∂η * 𝑦ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
590  // 𝒋₁₂ = ∑ (∂𝑦/∂η * 𝑧ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
591  // 𝒋₂₀ = ∑ (∂𝑧/∂ζ * 𝑥ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
592  // 𝒋₂₁ = ∑ (∂𝑧/∂ζ * 𝑦ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
593  // 𝒋₂₂ = ∑ (∂𝑧/∂ζ * 𝑧ᵢ) ∀ 𝑖= 𝟏,……,𝟖
594  Real3x3 J;
595  for (Int8 a = 0; a < 8; ++a) {
596  const Real3& n_coord = in_node_coord[cn_cv.nodeId(cell_lid, a)];
597  J[0][0] += dN_dxi[a] * n_coord.x; // ∂𝑥/∂ξ
598  J[0][1] += dN_dxi[a] * n_coord.y; // ∂𝑦/∂ξ
599  J[0][2] += dN_dxi[a] * n_coord.z; // ∂𝑧/∂ξ
600  J[1][0] += dN_deta[a] * n_coord.x; // ∂𝑥/∂η
601  J[1][1] += dN_deta[a] * n_coord.y; // ∂𝑦/∂η
602  J[1][2] += dN_deta[a] * n_coord.z; // ∂𝑧/∂η
603  J[2][0] += dN_dzeta[a] * n_coord.x; // ∂𝑥/∂ζ
604  J[2][1] += dN_dzeta[a] * n_coord.y; // ∂𝑦/∂ζ
605  J[2][2] += dN_dzeta[a] * n_coord.z; // ∂𝑧/∂ζ
606  }
607 
608  // Determinant and Inverse of the Jacobian
609  const Real detJ = math::matrixDeterminant(J);
610  if (detJ <= 0.0) {
611  //ARCANE_FATAL("Invalid (non-positive) Jacobian determinant: {0}", detJ);
612  }
613  const Real3x3 invJ = math::inverseMatrix(J, detJ);
614 
615  // Gradients in physical space (∂𝐍/∂𝑥, ∂𝐍/∂𝑦, ∂𝐍/∂𝑧)
616  // {∂𝐍/∂𝑥} = [J]⁻¹ {∂𝐍/∂ξ}
617  // {∂𝐍/∂𝑦} {∂𝐍/∂η}
618  // {∂𝐍/∂𝑧} {∂𝐍/∂ζ}
619  RealVector<8> dN_dx_result, dN_dy_result, dN_dz_result;
620  for (Int8 a = 0; a < 8; ++a) {
621  dN_dx_result(a) = invJ[0][0] * dN_dxi[a] + invJ[0][1] * dN_deta[a] + invJ[0][2] * dN_dzeta[a];
622  dN_dy_result(a) = invJ[1][0] * dN_dxi[a] + invJ[1][1] * dN_deta[a] + invJ[1][2] * dN_dzeta[a];
623  dN_dz_result(a) = invJ[2][0] * dN_dxi[a] + invJ[2][1] * dN_deta[a] + invJ[2][2] * dN_dzeta[a];
624  }
625 
626  return { dN_dx_result, dN_dy_result, dN_dz_result, detJ };
627 }
628 
629 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
630 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
631 
632 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D
633 
634 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
635 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
636 
637 namespace Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu
638 {
639 
640 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
641 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
642 
643 class BoundaryConditionsHelpers
644 {
645  public:
646 
647  template <class Function>
648  static void applyConstantSourceToRhsBase(Function computeSpatialIntegral, Real qdot,
649  RunQueue* queue, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na, IMesh* mesh,
650  const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes, const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord)
651  {
652  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(queue);
653  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(mesh);
654  ARCANE_CHECK_PTR(computeSpatialIntegral);
655 
656  UnstructuredMeshConnectivityView connectivity_view;
657  connectivity_view.setMesh(mesh);
658  NodeInfoListView nodes_infos(mesh->nodeFamily());
659  auto node_dof(dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
660  auto cn_cv = connectivity_view.cellNode();
661  auto nc_cv = connectivity_view.nodeCell();
662 
663  auto command = Accelerator::makeCommand(queue);
664 
665  auto in_out_rhs_variable_na = Accelerator::viewInOut(command, rhs_variable_na);
666  auto in_node_coord = Accelerator::viewIn(command, node_coord);
667 
668  // Iterate over all nodes and compute the contribution to the RHS
669  command << RUNCOMMAND_ENUMERATE(NodeLocalId, node_lid, mesh->allNodes())
670  {
671  if (nodes_infos.isOwn(node_lid)) {
672  Real sum = 0.0;
673  for (CellLocalId cell_lid : nc_cv.cells(node_lid)) {
674  Real domain = computeSpatialIntegral(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
675  sum += qdot * domain / cn_cv.nbItem(cell_lid);
676  }
677  in_out_rhs_variable_na[node_dof.dofId(node_lid, 0)] = sum;
678  }
679  };
680  }
681 
682  static void
683  applyDirichletToNodeGroupRhsOnly(Int32 dof_index, Real value, RunQueue* queue,
684  IMesh* mesh, DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
685  const NodeGroup& node_group);
686 
687  static void
688  applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaPenalty(Int32 dof_index, Real value, Real penalty, RunQueue* queue,
689  IMesh* mesh, DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
690  const NodeGroup& node_group);
691 
692  static void
693  applyDirichletToNodeGroupViaRowOrRowColumnElimination(Byte elimination_type, Int32 dof_index, Real value, RunQueue* queue,
694  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
695  const NodeGroup& node_group);
696 };
697 
698 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
699 /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
700 
701 class BoundaryConditions
702 {
703  public:
704 
705  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
712  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
713 
714  static void
715  applyDirichletToLhsAndRhs(BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
716  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
717  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
718 
719  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
726  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
727 
728  static void
729  applyPointDirichletToLhsAndRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
730  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
731  IMesh* mesh, RunQueue* queue);
732 
733  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
739  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
740 
741  static void
742  applyDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
743  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
744  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
745 
746  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
752  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
753 
754  static void
755  applyPointDirichletToRhs(BC::IDirichletPointCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
756  DoFLinearSystem& linear_system,
757  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
758 };
759 
760 class BoundaryConditions2D
761 {
762  public:
763 
764  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
773  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
774 
775  static void applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
776  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
777  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
778 
779  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
788  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
789 
790  static void applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
791  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
792  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
793 };
794

796 {
797  public:
798 
799  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
808  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
809 
810  static void applyConstantSourceToRhs(Real qdot, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
811  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
812  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);

825  static void applyNeumannToRhs(BC::INeumannBoundaryCondition* bs, const FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes,
826  const VariableNodeReal3& node_coord, VariableDoFReal& rhs_variable_na,
827  IMesh* mesh, Accelerator::RunQueue* queue);
828 };
